header: Everything you need to ship content faster
subheadline: The building blocks that make editorial work faster, safer, and on-brand.

items.title: Reusable content blocks
items.description: Compose pages from a shared catalog so editors stay consistent without touching code.

items.title: Token-driven theming
items.description: Switch the entire look with a shadcn preset — every element re-skins from semantic tokens.

items.title: Accessible by default
items.description: Keyboard focus, semantic landmarks, and screen-reader labels ship with every block.
